final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: documentary street photography, editorial photo
Primary request: documentary-style scene of devotees performing morning ritual bath in the Ganges River at Varanasi
Scene/backdrop: Varanasi ghats at dawn, ancient stone steps leading to the river, traditional wooden boats floating on misty water
Subject: devotees in traditional Indian attire performing morning ablutions, silhouettes and figures emerging from morning mist
Style/medium: documentary photography, photojournalistic style, film grain texture
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, environmental portrait, layered depth with foreground devotees and background boats
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour sunlight piercing through morning fog, soft diffused light, serene and spiritual atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones, soft blues and grays from the mist, earthy browns of the ghats
Materials/textures: weathered stone steps, rippling water surface, traditional cotton fabrics, wooden boat hulls
Constraints: preserve the authentic cultural atmosphere of Varanasi, keep the misty river ambiance
Avoid: oversaturated colors, tourist postcard clichés, plastic-looking water, artificial poses
